parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the phaser. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the phaser.
parameters-en.Feedback: Controls how much of the processed signal feeds back into the input, changing the shape of the phaser's notch filters.
parameters-en.Stage: Selects the number of phase stages, thus controlling the degree of out-of-phase-ness. The higher number of stages, the richer the effect.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal. For most phasers, you want to keep Mix set to 100%.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
